design_rules.rarity_rule: 4★ heroes have basic_attack + skill + ultimate_or_special + passive; identity is defined but not yet premium/unique 5★+ level.
design_rules.complexity: moderate; up to two correlated mechanics; no revive/execute/summon_or_proxy.
design_rules.runtime: schema-data only; not imported into DB; not authoritative for live battle runtime.
design_rules.validation: all IDs/elements/roles/factions should match Character Bible.

kit_complexity.passive: one defined passive with up to two simple always-on effects
